hero.titleLine2: And the products that make them possible.
hero.subtitle: A hybrid growth and engineering studio. What we recommend, we first validate in our own products.

problem.title: The problem is not a lack of data. It's that marketing, product, and technology work as islands.
problem.body: You invest in ads, hire agencies, install dashboards. And yet you feel like you're operating blindly. The reason is structural: your brand, your website, your product, and your ads were built at different times, with different providers, without a system to coordinate them.

01.title: 01 — Brand that doesn't scale
01.description: Your message changes with every campaign. The sales team says one thing, the website another, the ads another.

02.title: 02 — Ads that burn money
02.description: High volume, low quality, confused attribution. The CAC goes up, nobody knows why.

03.title: 03 — Technology that slows down
03.description: Your stack is a collection of tools, not a system. Every new integration breaks something.

method.title: A:BRA Loop: the system where growth and engineering feed each other.
method.subtitle: Most agencies sell you strategy. Product studios sell you code. We operate at the intersection: every marketing decision is validated by building, and every product is built with growth logic from day one.

01.name: Insight
01.title: 360° Audit
01.description: Brand, data, attribution, stack, market. AI applied to perception and competitive analysis.

02.name: Build
02.title: Growth Systems
02.description: Brand, web, landings, automations, micro-products. Vibe coding with technical rigor: AI-assisted prototyping.

03.name: Launch
03.title: Integrated Launch
03.description: Ads, SEO, content. Predictive models for bidding, segmentation, and attribution.

04.name: Learn
04.title: Analytics & Iteration
04.description: Dashboards, continuous iteration. Learning feeds back into Insight. The system improves with each cycle.

method.footer: It's not a funnel. It's a Flywheel: each turn of the Loop increases knowledge, reduces cost, and accelerates growth.

result.title: Ready to stop operating blindly?
result.description: Download the complete A:BRA Loop in PDF. It's the same framework we use for our products and clients. It shows you how to connect marketing, product, and technology into a single system.

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.subtitle: Our work speaks through measurable results

items.title: Brand Transformation
items.description: Complete identity redesign for tech startup

01.title: Data-Driven Branding
01.description: Identity and value proposition built on real perception analysis, not focus group intuitions.

02.title: Conversion-Focused Communication
02.description: Institutional narrative calibrated by the topics and messages that your data says convert.

03.title: Growth Marketing with applied AI
03.description: Paid media, SEO, automation, and advanced analytics. CAC down, LTV up, clear attribution.

04.title: Product and Web Development
04.description: Web, landings, and micro-products designed as conversion systems. Built fast, without breaking.

lab.title: We build our own products. That's why we know what works.
lab.body: Most agencies sell strategy they never executed with their own money. We do: we validate the A:BRA Loop on real products before applying it to clients.
lab.microcopy: Nougram was born in our lab to solve a real market pain: quoting knowledge with predictable net profitability.

nougram.title: Nougram
nougram.headline: How much do you really earn on every proposal you send?
nougram.description: An AI-powered quoter for agencies and professionals who sell knowledge. It turns your expertise into precise, profitable proposals with a focus on net margin—without guessing.

highlights.01: Secure your net profit before signing each deal.
highlights.02: Let AI handle the math and regain focus on creating value.
highlights.03: Built for consultants, designers, marketers, and agencies.

agent-x.title: Agent-X
agent-x.headline: Your growth team assisted by autonomous agents.
agent-x.description: Orchestrator of AI agents specialized in ads, SEO, and data analysis. Technical scalability for complex marketing operations.

highlights.02: Executive report generation with predictive insights.
highlights.03: Native integration with major market CRMs.

cases.title: The Loop, applied to real clients.
cases.subtitle: Growth, branding, and product systems implemented with the same framework we use in our laboratory.
cases.cardNote: A:BRA Loop implementation to scale operations and maximize retention.

process.title: From audit to a running system. In 90 days.

01.title: Insight
01.description: 360° audit: brand, data, attribution, stack, and market.

02.title: System design
02.description: We define pillars, KPIs, and the technical growth architecture.

03.title: Build & Launch
03.description: We launch campaigns, web, automations, and AI models.

04.title: Learn & Optimize
04.description: Data-driven iteration with biweekly executive reporting.

founder.title: Gerardo Riarte. Growth, AI, and product in one profile.
founder.body: A:BRA was born from a personal obsession: combining digital marketing with real technical development at a time when AI finally makes it possible. I am Gerardo Riarte, Argentine based in Bogotá. Over a decade designing growth strategies for LATAM brands, building web products and SaaS platforms, and applying AI to marketing before it was mainstream.
